arts.ttl: Lille, PSG Achieve What Real Madrid Couldn’t at Anfield in Champions League This Season
arts.sum: After surviving early pressure from Liverpool, Paris Saint-Germain took the lead in the 12th minute of the second leg, leveling the aggregate score at 1-1. Nuno Mendes played a pass to Ousmane Dembele, who quickly shifted the ball to Bradley Barcola on the right. arts.ttl: ‘Nobody expected that’: BBC pundit saw what Liverpool ace did to surprise entire PSG XI in first-half
arts.sum: Stephen Warnock could not believe his eyes after seeing Ibrahima Konate hit a great shot from such a far distance. During Liverpool’s Champions League contest with Paris Saint-Germain, the defender – who has been extensively linked with a move to the Parc des Princes – hit a long shot, but the PSG keeper caught it. arts.ttl: Ousmane Dembele Matches Real Madrid Legend Cristiano Ronaldo’s Feat After Goal vs Liverpool
arts.sum: After absorbing Liverpool’s early pressure, Paris Saint-Germain struck first in the 12th minute to take a 1-0 lead in the second leg, leveling the aggregate score at 1-1. Nuno Mendes picked out Ousmane Dembele in the middle, who quickly played it wide to Bradley Barcola on the right. arts.sum: After withstanding Liverpool’s surge in the early minutes of the first half, it’s Paris Saint-Germain that opens the scoring in the 12th minute to take a 1-0 lead in the second leg and level the scoring 1-1 on aggregate. arts.ttl: Liverpool transfer news: Two targets 'identified' by the Reds amid uncertainty over Virgil van Dijk's future
arts.sum: Liverpool are reportedly keeping tabs on two highly-rated young centre-backs as potential replacements for Virgil van Dijk, who is out contract this summer.

arts.ttl: Champions League live blog: Liverpool-PSG, Leverkusen-Bayern
arts.sum: Enjoy live updates from Tuesday's Champions League action as Liverpool take on Paris Saint-Germain, Leverkusen take on Bayern and Inter take on Feyenoord.

arts.ttl: Liverpool vs. PSG: Official Starting Lineups for Second Leg in Champions League
arts.sum: Paris Saint-Germain will be looking to overcome a 1-0 aggregate deficit against Liverpool at Anfield, and now the starting 11 for the two sides are revealed. The home side will be looking to at least hold onto their advantage if not increase their lead. arts.ttl: Ibrahima Konate 'privately admits he SHOULD have been' sent off against PSG last week - after Liverpool star's clumsy challenge on Bradley Barcola
arts.sum: Konate, 25, played the full 90 minutes of the Champions League last-16 clash on Wednesday as Liverpool secured a remarkable 1-0 victory despite PSG dominating the clash.

arts.ttl: Liverpool team news for PSG as striker decision made and key man returns
arts.sum: Arne Slot has named his XI for the Champions League showdown with PSG at Anfield as the Liverpool boss makes three changes

arts.ttl: PSG chairman makes classy Hillsborough gesture before Liverpool Champions League game
arts.sum: Liverpool host Paris Saint-Germain at Anfield in the Champions League last-16 second leg on Tuesday night.
